# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
- The `main`/`master` branch is supported with security updates.
- Release tags will be supported as capacity permits.

## Reporting a Vulnerability
- Email: security@qlang.dev
- Please include steps to reproduce, impact assessment, and any suggested fixes.
- We will acknowledge your report within 72 hours and keep you informed of the progress.

## Handling
- We follow responsible disclosure. We prefer reports via email and will coordinate on public disclosure timing once a fix is available.
